overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a racing simulator showing nighttime driving on a multi-lane highway during a heavy rainstorm. The driver overtakes a large cargo truck while lightning flashes in the sky and windshield wipers maintain visibility.

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the night sky and road ahead
approaching a large cargo truck in the left lane to begin overtaking

agents.ego_description: driving at highway speed through heavy rain with active windshield wipers, approaching slower traffic in the left lane

notable_agents.action: sedan driving ahead in the left lane, moving slower than ego vehicle

entered.detail: metal guardrail running along the right side of the highway
tall street lamps illuminating the highway at regular intervals
dark colored sedan visible in the left lane ahead
dark silhouettes of trees lining the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving on a multi-lane highway at night during a heavy rainstorm. The windshield wipers work continuously to clear the rain as the vehicle approaches slower traffic. A bright lightning flash briefly illuminates the sky around the 3-second mark, revealing the wet road surface and guardrail on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overtaking maneuver alongside large truck

events.description: driving alongside the large cargo truck, heavy water spray from truck wheels reduces visibility
completing the overtake of the cargo truck, pulling ahead of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: overtaking a large cargo truck on the left side while maintaining highway speed through heavy rain and spray

notable_agents.action: large cargo truck being overtaken, creating significant water spray from its wheels and bright red taillights

entered.detail: large white cargo truck with bright red taillights and reflective markings on the trailer

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives alongside and overtakes a large cargo truck that dominates the left side of the frame. Heavy water spray from the truck's wheels creates a misty effect on the windshield. The truck's bright red taillights and reflective trailer markings are prominent as the ego vehicle slowly pulls ahead to complete the pass.

events.description: vehicle with distinctive headlights overtakes the ego car on the left side at high speed
approaching oncoming traffic with bright headlights visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing down the highway at steady speed, navigating through scattered traffic while maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: vehicle overtaking the ego car on the left at high speed with bright headlights

entered.detail: faint ambient glow of city lights visible on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: After overtaking the truck, the vehicle continues down the open highway with reduced traffic. Around the 24-second mark, another vehicle overtakes on the left. The road stretches ahead with street lights continuing into the distance and the faint glow of city lights visible on the horizon through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a nighttime highway drive that transitions from a tense encounter with heavy traffic into an open stretch of rain-slicked road. It begins with the vehicle pushing through a heavy rainstorm, where windshield wipers work rhythmically and a sudden flash of lightning briefly illuminates the wet asphalt and roadside guardrails. As the camera approaches slower traffic, the view becomes dominated by a large cargo truck, with heavy water spray from its wheels creating a misty veil across the windshield while red taillights glow intensely during the overtake. The scene then opens up as the truck is left behind, shifting the focus to the empty highway ahead where street lights stretch into the distance. Finally, the camera maintains its forward momentum as another vehicle flashes past on the left, revealing the faint, blurred glow of city lights on the horizon through the persistent rain.
